name: Squid with Green Pepper and Black Bean Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green bell pepper, cored and seeded
1 tablespoon Chinese rice wine or 1 tablespoon dry sherry
A few drops of sesame oil
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the squid by discarding the head, transparent backbone, and ink sac. Remove and discard the skin, then wash the squid and dry thoroughly.
2. Open the squid and score the flesh in a criss-cross pattern with a sharp knife. Cut into pieces about the size of an oblong postage stamp.
3. Blanch the squid in boiling water for a few seconds, then remove and drain well.
4. Cut the green pepper into small triangular pieces.
5. Heat oil in a wok and stir-fry the green pepper for about 1 minute. Add garlic, ginger, scallions, salt, and squid; continue stirring for another minute.
6. Add black bean sauce and wine or sherry; blend well. Sprinkle with sesame oil and serve.
Origin: Taste of China (a Cantonese recipe). Shared by Ed Vroone. Formatted by Cathy Harned.
